data.body: 7c27 continuation TDD oracle: 11 proof-only named tests GREEN against existing behavior. Five intended RED: comparative prerequisite_fidelity_report kwargs rejected; baseline lacks atomic scalar metadata; CLI ignores comparative regression; required 8-scenario corpus absent; spot eval does not exercise focused finder singleton/packed. RED run captured before production edits. Holding out tests/unit/test_plan_review_prerequisites_continuation_heldout.py; implementer sees only comparative report happy path in test_plan_review_prerequisites.py.
